title: Segment Destination
description: A Segment destination represents a configured integration that receives analytics data routed from Segment sources. Destinations can be analytics tools, data warehouses, marketing platforms, or custom webhook endpoints.

id.description: The unique identifier of the destination.

name.description: The display name of the destination.

enabled.description: Whether the destination is currently enabled and receiving data.

sourceId.description: The ID of the source this destination is connected to.

settings.description: Configuration settings specific to the destination type, such as API keys, account IDs, or mapping options.

labels.description: Labels applied to the destination for organization and access control.

DestinationMetadata.description: Metadata about the destination type from the Segment catalog.

id.description: The metadata ID from the catalog.

name.description: The name of the destination integration.

slug.description: The slug of the destination integration.

description.description: A description of the destination integration.

supportedMethods.description: Which Segment call types this destination supports.
